title: Urban Survivors
subtitle: The toughest neighbors on the block
intro: You proved the city is alive. Now meet the specialists -- the animals and plants that out-tough the concrete every day of the year.
outro: Urban ecologists study exactly what you just documented. Your block is on the record now -- and there's a lot more city left.

steps.description: Find a bird or a mammal making a living in the city

steps.hint: Check walls and corners near streetlights -- lights pull in bugs, and bugs pull in spiders.

steps.description: Find a new-to-you plant beating the pavement
steps.hint: Tree pits, wall seams, gutter edges. Overlooked ground grows overlooked plants.
